name: Syros

family.reason: Quiet beaches and charming old town.

luxury.reason: Few luxury options but high character.

budget.reason: Good value compared to other Cyclades.

nightlife.reason: Bars in Ermoupoli but no clubs.

food.reason: Serious food culture with local specialties.

quick_summary: The Cyclades' capital, Syros offers neoclassical architecture, medieval Ano Syros, and authentic year-round island life.
